metadata.archetype_justification: Greenshot is a native Windows desktop application that captures and annotates screenshots locally. It has no persistent data store, no HTTP/RPC server surface, no authentication surface for external callers, and no write operations exposed to agents.
metadata.dev_library_application_rationale: Service archetype is stateless-utility AND all five surface flags are false. This repository functions as a desktop end-user tool with no agent-callable surface.

findings.title: No API surface — desktop application
findings.description: Greenshot is a native Windows desktop application (WinExe, .NET Framework 4.8). It does not expose any REST, GraphQL, gRPC, or AsyncAPI interface. The application is launched via system tray and interacts with users through WinForms/WPF UI and hotkeys. No HTTP listener or server component exists.
findings.gap: No API surface exists for agent consumption. Integration requires UI automation or building a wrapper.
findings.recommendation: If agent integration is desired, build a lightweight API wrapper or evaluate headless alternatives.

findings.title: No authentication surface for external callers
findings.description: Greenshot has no authentication surface for external callers. It is a desktop application running under local Windows user context. OAuth2 client flows exist for outbound calls to Box, Dropbox, and Imgur APIs, but no inbound authentication is implemented.
findings.gap: No machine identity mechanism exists because no agent-callable surface exists.
findings.recommendation: No action required. If repackaged as a service, implement machine identity (OAuth2 client credentials or API keys with principal attribution).

findings.title: No audit logging — desktop application
findings.description: System does not execute agent-invoked write operations — audit logging is a consumer responsibility. Greenshot uses log4net for local diagnostic logging but this is not an immutable audit trail.
findings.gap: No immutable audit logging — expected for a desktop application with no agent-callable surface.

ara_metadata.conditional_resolution: Resolved to INFO: agent_scope=read-only AND surface-flag downgrade (has_auth_surface=false, has_write_operations=false)
ara_metadata.resolution_reasoning: System does not execute agent-invoked write operations. No auth surface and no write operations exist. Audit logging is a consumer responsibility for this desktop utility.

findings.title: No write operations — compensation not applicable
findings.description: System exposes no write operations — compensation logic is not applicable. Greenshot is a desktop screenshot tool; its operations are user-initiated and local.
findings.gap: No agent-initiated write workflows exist to require compensation.

ara_metadata.conditional_resolution: Resolved to INFO: agent_scope=read-only AND surface-flag downgrade (has_write_operations=false, has_http_rpc_surface=false)
ara_metadata.resolution_reasoning: System exposes no write operations and no HTTP/RPC surface. No multi-step write workflows exist that would need compensation. Desktop application with user-initiated local operations only.

findings.title: Not a data-handling target
findings.description: Not a data-handling target — no PII/PHI/financial/credential data is stored, processed, or logged by the system in an agent-accessible manner. Screenshots are stored locally. OAuth tokens are encrypted in local INI files for end-user use.
findings.gap: No data classification concern for agent integration.

ara_metadata.conditional_resolution: Resolved to INFO: dev-library-application override applied, Stage A = No (not a data-handling target)
ara_metadata.resolution_reasoning: Desktop screenshot tool with no persistent data store accessible to agents. OAuth tokens are stored locally encrypted for end-user use. No PII/PHI/financial data is exposed to external callers.

b1.reasoning: Stage A resolved to No — system is not a data-handling target. B1 not evaluated.

b2.reasoning: Stage A resolved to No — system is not a data-handling target. B2 not evaluated.

b3.reasoning: Stage A resolved to No — system is not a data-handling target. B3 not evaluated.
